concept: Could you design a game where I control a character made of clay that can reshape itself to solve puzzles and overcome obstacles? In hot environments, my character becomes softer and more malleable but vulnerable to deformation; in cold areas, it becomes harder and more durable but less flexible. Various tools can be collected to carve, mold, or imprint patterns that grant special properties to different body parts. The ultimate goal is to discover my character's origin in an ancient pottery workshop and choose between remaining a unique creation or returning to raw clay to free other potential forms.
